idea.title: Gerrymander
idea.hook: Drop 10 city halls on a voter map — Voronoi tessellation redraws every district line, and you must win 6 of 10 districts to seize parliament.
idea.prototype: Vanilla canvas, 20×14 voter grid colored by party (Red/Blue/Yellow). Player places 10 city halls; brute-force nearest-hall assignment forms 10 Voronoi districts. Player wins a district if it has the most red cells. Goal: 6 of 10 districts. Five rounds with worsening voter mix. No timer; pressure is the 10-placement budget.
idea.mutation_of: Strategy/TD cluster from market-radar (Yandex/CrazyGames TD verticals) crossed with the CTR meme_ip_bait archetype — strategic placement puzzle wearing toy-plastic election-politician cover art.
idea.why_novel: TD games are additive; placement games are usually territorial (Go-style) or capture-the-flag. A Voronoi-driven district-plurality puzzle reads instantly from the cover but has real strategic depth: cluster-vs-split, wasted votes, opponent-stronghold splitting — concepts borrowed from real-world gerrymandering theory but compressed into 10 decisions per map.
idea.non_timer_pressure: 10-hall placement budget per round + 6-of-10 district threshold + 5-round difficulty curve where opposition shares climb +7% per round
idea.lose_condition: Spent all 10 hall placements with fewer than 6 districts won.

sources.title: Obby: Dig Brainrots
sources.snippet: Top CTR new-section hit on CrazyGames 2026-05-20 — meme_ip_bait archetype: toy-plastic exaggerated mascot, recognizable reference, loud saturated rendering. Used as cover-art clickability anchor.

sources.title: Friday Night Funkin' Brainrot
sources.snippet: High-scoring Yandex new-section title 2026-05-20 — confirms meme_ip_bait CTR pattern transferring to Russian portal traffic.

sources.title: Dig and Descend: Obby Mine
sources.snippet: CTR swipe reference 2026-05-20 — factory/money/upgrade loop visible in one glance. Borrowed for the cover's big-stamp-onto-voter-map composition: simple production chain rendered as politician+stamp+map.

sources.title: Obby Space Challenge: Starships
sources.snippet: Fourth CTR reference confirming the toy-plastic-meme-bait archetype dominating new-section thumbs on 2026-05-20.

synthesizer_brief: CTR-experiment slot: strategy/placement puzzle with meme-bait toy-plastic election-politician cover. Vanilla JS Voronoi tessellation, 6-of-10 district win condition, no timer, 5 rounds.

alternatives.title: Trail Weaver
alternatives.hook: Walk a single character across a procedural map by laying tile paths one cell at a time — every tile costs a star, and the goal flickers between locations.
alternatives.why_novel: Inverts the autoplay of mobile puzzle-walkers — you DRAW the path, character executes.

alternatives.title: Lucky Egg Bias
alternatives.hook: Idle clicker where you crack eggs to bias a hidden RNG dial — each egg reveals a number that nudges future probabilities, and you race to set the dial before the timer in your gut runs out.
alternatives.why_novel: Visible RNG manipulation is rare — most idle games hide the dice.

alternatives.title: Goose Heist
alternatives.hook: Stealth-action where you're a goose pulling small heists in a top-down park — honk to distract guards, peck to grab loot, waddle quietly past dog patrols.
alternatives.mutation_of: Untitled Goose Game meme + casual stealth
alternatives.why_novel: Casual web portals have very few stealth games and the goose IP is meme-bait.

alternatives.title: Ragdoll Foundry
alternatives.hook: Drop ragdoll workers onto a conveyor of crushing machinery — score is how much molten metal they pour before the funny-bone limbs fail.
alternatives.why_novel: Ragdolls are CTR gold; combining with idle-factory loop gives retention.

alternatives.title: Blink Detective
alternatives.hook: Speed-detective game where suspects answer in 3-second bursts and you have to blink at the exact moment they lie — uses webcam blink detection optional, click/space fallback.
alternatives.why_novel: Webcam-optional games are rare on web portals; novel input even with click fallback.
